meta.description: Import, clean, analyze, and visualize your sales data with an automated medallion pipeline. AI-powered insights, real-time dashboards, and enterprise-grade quality gates.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about DataPulse.

formats.question: What data formats does DataPulse support?
formats.answer: DataPulse supports Excel (.xlsx, .xls) and CSV files. Our import engine uses Polars with PyArrow for blazing-fast processing of files up to 500 MB with automatic schema detection.

medallion.question: How does the medallion architecture work?
medallion.answer: Data flows through three layers: Bronze (raw import), Silver (cleaned and validated via dbt), and Gold (aggregated business metrics). Each layer has quality gates to ensure data integrity.

quality.question: What quality checks are included?
quality.answer: 7 automated checks run at each pipeline stage: row count validation, null rate analysis, schema drift detection, duplicate detection, value range checks, referential integrity, and freshness monitoring.

ai.question: Can I use my own AI/LLM provider?
ai.answer: Yes. DataPulse uses OpenRouter which gives you access to multiple AI models. You can configure your preferred provider and model in the settings.

security.question: Is my data secure?
security.answer: Absolutely. DataPulse uses tenant-scoped Row Level Security (RLS) on all database tables, CORS protection, Content Security Policy headers, and all credentials are managed via environment variables.

setup.question: How long does setup take?
setup.answer: Under 5 minutes. Run docker compose up and your entire stack is ready: PostgreSQL, the API, dashboard, pipeline automation, and AI insights.

free.question: What's included in the free tier?
free.answer: The Starter plan includes 1 data source, up to 10,000 rows, the basic analytics dashboard, daily quality checks, and community support. No credit card required.

custom.question: Do you offer custom integrations?
custom.answer: Enterprise customers get custom integrations including SSO, webhook notifications, custom data connectors, and dedicated n8n workflow templates for their specific pipeline needs.
